claim_scope: 60-day yfinance 30-minute underlying history with prior-completed-session regime/IV features and synthetic listed-Friday/rounded-strike Black-Scholes option marks; L0 discovery/falsification only, no observed option fills, L1, registration, paper, shadow, arm, broker, or live claim
falsifier: reject when no symbol/structure has a train-selected bucket that independently passes train and untouched holdout at 5% leg slip and $0.01 half-spread per leg with n>=3, positive PnL, max_loss<=300, max/window DD<=75, dense negatives<=5, exact ledger, and no same-bar or same-date/session-bucket reentry
hypothesis: one open/midday/late 30-minute entry bucket selected only on chronological train improves a defined-risk PCS, CCS, or IC proxy and remains positive and bounded on untouched holdout under both adverse cost axes

call_credit_spread.max_lots: reported by axis; operating posture 1 lot

iron_condor.max_lots: reported by axis; operating posture 1 lot

put_credit_spread.max_lots: reported by axis; operating posture 1 lot

validity.population_pure: only requested PCS/CCS/IC rows; no registry mutation
validity.selection: bucket selected on chronological train only; holdout is untouched unless train passes
validity.signal: all option-entry regime/IV features come from a prior completed market date; entry_signal_lag_bars=1
validity.source_limit: yfinance 60d intraday retention; proxy options cannot earn L1
